query:
UPDATE tachyon_apps_order.consumer_orders
            SET status = ?,
                ready_at = COALESCE(?, ready_at),
                picked_up_at = COALESCE(?, picked_up_at),
                pickup_deadline = COALESCE(?, pickup_deadline),
                cancelled_at = COALESCE(?, cancelled_at)
            WHERE tenant_id = ? AND id = ?
